title: I bought these headphones about a year ago (from Best Buy) after having tried two other brands that were ...
text: I bought these headphones about a year ago (from Best Buy) after having tried two other brands that were a bit more expensive but sounded horrible. One destroyed itself with a "pop" and the other set sounded like the music was coming through a pillow, very muffled. The reasons I decided to give these a try was because of all of the great things said about them on youtube and other places. They're comfortable and they have a clean sound to them that I *really* like. And while I'm far from an expert on these types of matters, all I can say is that if you want an inexpensive set of headphones that sound great I'm sure you'll love these as much as I love 'em! One small note: I looked on my set and I don't see "Extra Bass" and, too, mine don't fold up in the middle. Other than those things, I'm inclined to think they're the same set, but am not 100% sure.
